🌊

Lisbon long weekend

Example 3-day city break

Tiles trams custard tarts coastal light

Tester One · Tester Two

📅 2026-06-13 → 2026-06-15 · 3 days

Overview

Compact three-day loop: arrive straight into the old quarter, spend a full day west toward Belém, then a hill-town escape to Sintra before a short final morning in Baixa–Chiado.

  • Carry light layers; Atlantic evenings stay cool even in June.
  • Book Sintra palace entries online to skip the longest ticket lines.

Itinerary

Afternoon
Mid-afternoon
Land & metro to Chiado/Baixa
Aeroporto → Aeroporto–Saldanha (Red); short walk or taxi to hotel zone.
transitearly Afternoon
Late afternoon
Check-in & decompress
Unpack twenty minutes—then daylight is still useful for viewpoints.
late Afternoon
Evening
Evening
Stroll Sé → Miradouro da Senhora do Monte
Steep lanes; pause for sunset over the Tagus.
scenic
Night
Night
Dinner fado-lite or quiet tasca
Book ahead Friday–Saturday; otherwise queue early.
dining
🎫
Store a NFC transit card setup before rush hour—you will tap buses trams metro interchanges endlessly.
Morning
Morning
Tram 15E or bus toward Belém
Expect weekend crowds; go early for Jerónimos tight interior photos.
transitlate Morning
Afternoon
Midday
Tower + monument exteriors
Maritime museum optional if heat spikes—AC recover.
Afternoon
Pastéis de Belém seated service
Counter is fast; salon is slower calmer—both valid.
diningearly Afternoon
Evening
Evening
MAAT exterior walk or Docas dock drink
Sunset light on the bridge from the promenade.
scenic
Morning
8:10 AM
Rossio rail to Sintra
40-minute hop; first bus up the ridge beats rental-car restrictions.
transitearly Morning
Late morning
Pena circuit exterior + Moorish walls photo pass
Skip interior second passes if time tight—gardens still deliver drama.
scenic
Afternoon
Afternoon
Return train & hotel shower buffer
Buffer ninety minutes before airport run.
Evening
Evening
Flight home
Example placeholder time—replace with live booking.
flight
⏱️
Sintra microclimate runs 5–8°C cooler than Lisbon—wind shell in the pack.

Logistics & tasks

Confirm Sintra palace slot before travel week
· high · due 2026-06-10

Food

Meal cues often live inline on each itinerary day.
For cross-cutting reminders, reuse overview bullets:

  • Carry light layers; Atlantic evenings stay cool even in June.
  • Book Sintra palace entries online to skip the longest ticket lines.

Reference

lis-panel-day1

## Alfama dusk loop

- Enter from the Sé side to avoid climbing the steepest face first.
- Carry €5 coins for miradouro vending lockers if hauling a small tripod.
- If knees complain swap Senhora route for Graça viewpoints—same vista band lower pitch.

TripPWA · TripTemplate schema 3.0.0 · rev 1
